name: American Pawn
description_short: American Pawn in North Miami offers fast cash loans using personal items as collateral. Open weekdays and Saturday mornings with convenient SR-7 location.
description_long:
American Pawn operates as a pawn shop located in North Miami, Florida, at 13007 SR-7 between NW 130th and NW 131st Streets. The business model centers on providing immediate liquidity to consumers by accepting personal goods—jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and other valuables—as collateral for short-term loans. This traditional pawn shop approach has served as an alternative financial access point for decades, particularly for unbanked or underbanked consumers needing quick cash without credit checks.

American Pawn's core service is straightforward: customers can bring in quality goods and receive fast cash loans based on the assessed value of those items. The business advertises this as "Fast cash for quality goods," indicating their focus on rapid transaction processing and selective acceptance of merchandise. The pawn model allows customers to reclaim their items by repaying the loan plus interest within a specified timeframe, or the shop retains ownership and sells the items if the loan goes unpaid.

The business distinguishes itself through convenient operating hours—open 9 AM to 6 PM Monday through Friday, 10 AM to 2 PM Saturday, and closed Sunday. The mid-range pricing tier ($$) suggests moderate loan amounts and reasonable terms compared to some competitors. Their North Miami location provides accessibility to the local community, and the direct phone line (305) 769-1501 enables quick inquiries about item valuations.

However, pawn shops carry inherent limitations. Interest rates on pawn loans, while typically lower than payday loans, still represent a cost to borrowing. Customers lose access to their items during the loan period, which can be problematic if those goods have sentimental or immediate practical value. The business model also depends on accurate item appraisal and fair valuation—factors not detailed on the listing. No information is provided about their specific terms, interest rates, loan duration, or redemption policies.
pros: Fast cash availability without credit checks or income verification
Convenient weekday hours (9 AM–6 PM Monday–Friday) plus Saturday morning service
Direct phone line for quick valuations and inquiries
No debt obligation—customers reclaim items by repaying loan, or lose collateral only
Accessible North Miami location on major SR-7 corridor
Moderate pricing tier suggests competitive loan structures
Simple, straightforward transaction process for immediate cash needs
cons: No information provided about interest rates, loan terms, or redemption periods
Customers lose access to personal items during entire loan duration
Limited operating hours (closed Sundays; early Saturday closing at 2 PM)
Item valuations depend on subjective appraisal with no disclosed standards or guarantees
Risk of permanent loss of items if unable to repay loan within terms
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash with no credit history or active credit issues
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments) they can temporarily part with
Individuals seeking collateral-based loans without debt obligations to credit reports
diagnosis: American Pawn is best for consumers facing immediate cash shortages who own valuable items they can temporarily pledge as collateral. The primary caveat is the complete absence of disclosed terms—interest rates, loan duration, redemption fees, and valuation methodology are not provided, making it essential to call ahead or visit in person to understand exact costs and conditions before pledging items.
